  Component `` has sidecar tests that require a shared assertions crate, but `` is still a single-crate package. Reshape it into one package with sibling member crates under `crates/`: `crates/runtime` for the production crate and `crates/assertions` for shared test proof. Do not add `/assertions/Cargo.toml` directly under the current crate root, because that creates a nested package instead of sibling member crates.
